data.title: 国际服网页活动「Halo Festival Winner Predictions Event」
data.summary: [Halo Festival Winner Predictions Event] There's a special poll event on our official YouTube channe
data.body:
[Halo Festival Winner Predictions Event] 

There's a special poll event on our official YouTube channel celebrating the grand opening of Halo Festival, Sensei!

➡️ Official YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@bluearchive_Global/community
➡️ Event Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2522831
